note: Fixed corpus for the velocity-dealias regression harness (dev-only). Each volume is a committed .V06 under Assets/RadarCorpus/, replayed through the REAL decode/dealias path (radar-decode.js decodeAndBuild -> dealiasSweep) and scored on its over-unfold ratio (hi/total, |v|>55 m/s gates). 'expectedPct' is the established baseline over-unfold percentage; a run flags a volume 'Worse' when actual exceeds expectedPct + tolerancePct (the KTLX-3x-regression guard). To score a volume WITHOUT committing it, drop the .V06 into Assets/RadarCorpus/ (it is served the same way) and list it here by filename, then just don't 'git add' it. Seed cases from docs/radar-validation.md 'First full network sweep (2026-07-20)'.
